title: Company Handbook
content: The company handbook is available to all employees. It explains working principles, communication standards, onboarding expectations, responsible AI principles, security awareness, and how teams should collaborate across departments. The handbook is intended as a general reference for all staff.

title: HR Salary Review Policy
content: The HR salary review policy describes compensation review cycles, salary bands, promotion calibration, manager input, moderation meetings, and annual reward planning. This document is restricted to the HR group and should not be visible to engineering or general employees.

title: RAG Platform Architecture
content: The RAG platform architecture document explains the ingestion pipeline, chunking service, embedding model, vector database, reranker adapter, PII redaction layer, audit logging, source connectors, and retrieval API. It also describes how authentication and user group metadata are passed into ACL-aware retrieval.

title: Finance Forecast and Budget Planning
content: The finance forecast document includes budget planning assumptions, cost centre forecasts, hiring plan impacts, vendor spend, cloud infrastructure cost estimates, and financial planning notes for leadership review. Access is limited to finance and leadership groups.

title: Customer Onboarding Playbook
content: The customer onboarding playbook explains how implementation teams move new customers from kickoff to go-live. It includes discovery, access setup, source connector configuration, permission checks, stakeholder mapping, training, success criteria, and production handover steps.

title: AI Product Roadmap
content: The AI product roadmap describes planned improvements to retrieval quality, evaluation metrics, source connectors, MCP server support, reranker experiments, prompt safety, PII handling, tenant isolation, and integration with external enterprise systems.
